title: Segfault on malformed csv import
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (a TEXT, b BIGINT, c FLOAT DEFAULT NULL, d DATE NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test (a, b, c, d) VALUES ('valid', 123, 45.67, '2023-10-01');
INSERT INTO test (a, b, c, d) VALUES (NULL, NULL, NULL, '2023-10-02');
INSERT INTO test (a, b, c, d) VALUES ('malformed', CAST('not_a_number' AS SIGNED), 3.14, NULL);
SELECT * FROM test WHERE b IS NULL OR c > 100.0;
key_bug_features: malformed csv import causing segmentation fault
